name: Salamat Abu Al Banat
overview: Following his retirement, Al-Mokhtar Salamat, a father to three daughters, tries to connect with his family and build bridges of communication and understanding, but he soon realizes that he has been so busy with his job that he couldn't see the changes in their attitudes and ideologies.

trailers.title: الموسم الرابع من سلمات أبو البنات | رمضان 2022 | شاهدVIP
